allow: Bash(go build ./... 2>&1 && echo "BUILD OK" && go vet ./... 2>&1 && echo "VET OK")
Bash(git init && git remote add origin https://github.com/Cloverhound/cupi-cli.git)
Bash(git add .gitignore CLAUDE.md SKILL.md install-local.sh go.mod go.sum main.go cmd/ internal/ tools/ skill/ && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial implementation of cupi-cli

Complete Go CLI for Cisco Unity Connection \(CUC\) wrapping CUPI REST/JSON
provisioning API, PAWS platform admin, AST health monitoring, and DIME log
collection. Modeled after cucm-cli with REST-native design for /vmrest/ API.

Features:
- Auth: OS keyring storage for cupi/application/platform credential types
- CUPI resources: users, distlists, handlers, cos, templates, schedules, system
- AST: VOS-common health checks \(disk, tftp, heartbeat, alerts, perfmon\)
- PAWS: cluster status/replication, DRS backup/status
- DIME: log file download with binary DIME/MIME parsing
- tools/scraper: Phase 1 HTML scraper for 49 CUPI API doc chapters
- skill/SKILL.md: Claude Code skill definition
- Global flags: --server, --output, --debug, --max, --dry-run

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git fetch origin 2>&1 && git log --oneline origin/main 2>&1)
Bash(git merge origin/main --allow-unrelated-histories -m "Merge LICENSE from GitHub initial commit" 2>&1)

Bash(git add .gitignore && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add tests/ to .gitignore

Integration tests require a live CUC server and are excluded from the repo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Implement all remaining CUPI API commands \(full coverage\)

- Add resolveCredentials\(\) helper to cmd/root.go to DRY up credential resolution
- Implement 12 previously-stub cmd files: authrules, chtemplates, configvalues,
  phonesystems \(+ axlservers\), portgroups, ports, restrictiontables \(+ patterns\),
  roles, routingrules \(+ conditions\), searchspaces \(+ members\), smtp \(server/client\)
- Add cmd/alternatenames.go with full CRUD
- Add all user sub-resource commands: altexts, mwi, privatelists, roles, credential,
  mailbox, notifications
- Add handler sub-resource commands: greetings, menuentries, transferoptions
- Add dirhandlers, inthandlers \(+ questions\), partitions commands
- Add 24 new internal/client packages covering full CUPI API surface

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(for cmd in users handlers dirhandlers routingrules restrictiontables searchspaces phonesystems smtp; do
  echo "=== $cmd ==="
  cupi $cmd --help 2>&1 | grep -A 50 "Available Commands:" | grep "^  " | wc -l
done)
Bash(git add cmd/ast_perfmon.go cmd/ast_alerts.go cmd/ast_services.go cmd/ast.go cmd/ast_system.go internal/client/ast.go && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Extend AST API coverage with perfmon drill-down, service management, and alert detail

Adds 6 new client functions and 7 new commands:

Client \(internal/client/ast.go\):
- GetASTPerfmonCounters: PerfmonListCounter — lists counters with description/unit for a specific object
- GetASTPerfmonData: PerfmonCollectCounterData — collects real-time counter values
- GetASTServiceList: GetServiceList — lists all VOS services and their status
- DoASTServiceAction: DoServiceAction — Start/Stop/Restart a named VOS service
- GetASTAlertDetail: GetAlertDetail — retrieves full detail for a specific alert by ID

Commands:
- cupi ast perfmon counters <object>   — drill into a perfmon object's counters
- cupi ast perfmon collect <object>    — collect live counter values
- cupi ast alerts get <alertID>        — detailed alert info
- cupi ast services list               — list all services
- cupi ast services start <name>       — start a service
- cupi ast services stop <name>        — stop a service
- cupi ast services restart <name>     — restart a service

Also refactors ast_system.go to use resolveCredentials\(\) helper \(removes duplicate 4-step pattern\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

- Add GitHub Actions CI workflow \(build + vet on push/PR\)
- Add GitHub Actions release workflow triggered on v* tags via GoReleaser
- Add .claude/settings.local.json for project tooling config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
